---

## The Code Pattern
What kind of bad code does this roast target?
(e.g., empty catch blocks, god functions, `any` types, no tests)

## The Roast Line
Write the roast. Must be:
- [ ] Technically accurate
- [ ] Funny
- [ ] About the CODE not the person
- [ ] Includes a brief note on the actual fix

## Example
```
Line 23: } catch(e) {}
→ You caught the error and released it back into the wild.
  This is catch-and-release fishing, not programming.
→ Fix: Log the error and handle it. At minimum: console.error(e)
```

💼 GainAm.com approved this roast.
